teams.description: Basic stamina team
teams.author: Adaves
teams.name: Basic stamina

teams.description: Early stamina team to farm when going to sleep, gems not mandatory just avoid types imunities. Pokemons should be easy to get then slowly get pick pocket by genetic and finish with the items
teams.author: Adaves
teams.name: Early stamina farming

teams.description:
Laissez vos poke mourir pour le plaisir de palkia, selon le poke en face changez son moov set, 
Chomp sert de poseur de climat donc à adapter aussi et au besoin il donne le type sol pour plus de dégât. 
Les raid se font en 5-10 secondes normalement.
Ps : merci à ceux qui ont participé à la conception et aux autres.
teams.author: Aigris numéro 2
teams.name: Palkia vs le monde

teams.description: Il se fait pas toucher
teams.author: Apielickmyballs
teams.name: Cassage de Baxca

teams.description: Une team feu manuelle basé sur une team factory de Kridx qui fonctionne plutôt bien en frontier. Je pose le climat et le buff sur la team puis j'alterne les pokémons tant qu'ils ont du buff.
teams.author: Baltimor
teams.name: Team Frontier C

teams.description: Slowpoke pour psy/acier. Drifloon pour combat. Magnemite pour vol/sol. Skiploom imu grass. Spheal imu water. Varoom pour fairy. Les plus important a monté sont Slowpoke et Drifloon. Slowpoke tank toutes les attaques psy. Peut utilisé n'importe quel pokémon qui à les imu water et grass
teams.author: Darkaufeu
teams.name: Team Tower Psychic C

teams.description: Pas compliquer a faire comme équipe ( je trouve ). Fonctionne super bien en auto
teams.author: Majorchewie
teams.name: Vs Pika Gmax

teams.description: team facto late game qui win n'importe qu'elle poke faible au type sol de n'importe quel rang

teams.name: facto faiblesse sol ultime

teams.description: team optimal pour farm caps dans les zones bas level

teams.name: speed farm V5

teams.description: alternative a la v5 opti pour les zone où il manque des shiny
teams.author: personne
teams.name: speed farm V5 avec gromago/charm

teams.description: Tinkatink/Spritzee resiste au dragon, faire un switch sur Spritzee et revenir sur Tinkatink lors du Applin, Bronzor sol, 2 poke glace changeable pour finir les dernier poke après que Tinkatink et Spritzee soient KO.
teams.author: personne
teams.name: team tower dragon C

teams.description: Maractus pour fée/eau, Magneton pour vol / Lairon pour normal / Slowpoke pour psy / les 2 autres possible a changer au besoin.
teams.author: personne
teams.name: team tower eau B

teams.description: cacnea casi solo la tower, mettre magnemite sur les attaque poison/vol
teams.author: personne
teams.name: team tower eau C

teams.description: Lugulabre vs bug, slowking vs fire, drifloon vs combat, lanturn vs elec/psy, tangela ghost (poison optionnel)/tinkatink dragon. Possiblité de prendre musharna imu ghost avec talent a la place de tangela ghost pour imu burn.
teams.author: personne
teams.name: team tower feu A

teams.description: Torchic vs move plante, Tinkatink pour applin sur les dernier étage, Oddish et Remoraid sont là que pour imu, possible de mettre n'importe qui, les 2 dernier slot sont pas utile mais prendre un poke pour envoyer sur les attaque roche et vol si besoin.
teams.author: personne
teams.name: team tower grass C

teams.description: tower avec énormément de move pas du type spectre. team : tangela pour spectre/poison , cacnea pour plante/eau , magneton pour vol/acier , klang pour glace , bronzong pour sol/fée , chandelure pour fire (possibilité de prendre l'évolution de cacnea et changer klang pour laturn flash cryo et avoir l'imunité électrique en plus et bug guard de chandelure inutile possibilité de mettre flash psychia) vers la fin de la tower spectreval avec des move psy et combat essayer de répartir les dégâts pour pas perdre de pokemon
teams.author: personne
teams.name: tower A spectre

teams.description: klang vs ice / lairon vs normal / magneton vs vol,sol,bug / remoraid vs water et floette blue vs fée juste la pour le talent / dernier poke prendre un poke res roche iv up si besoin.
teams.author: personne
teams.name: tower B ice

teams.description: Remettre helioptile quand la sand part pas besoin de switch autrement. build le helioptile et garchomp qui casi solo et mettre des gros poke qui tape super efficace pour finir la tower
teams.author: personne
teams.name: tower SS rock

teams.description: tinkaton vs feu/dragon ; tengela vs spectre/poison ; lantrun vs psy (possible de prendre un autre poke flash psy) ; bronzong vs fée (possible de prendre un autre poke flash fée) ; chandelure pas utile possible de prendre une double res dark ; drifloon vs combat
teams.author: personne
teams.name: tower S+ spectre

teams.name: GROKATCHU

teams.description: Full Bourin
teams.author: rtwarthur
teams.name: Kyurem White

teams.description: This is an afk team to down Palkia without Marshadow or White Apricot Memories, only pokemons from normal raids! Typhlosion is the main carry and gets Palkia to mid-HP; Heatran and Mega Charizard then push it to 25%. When the SpDef buff triggers, Mega Blaziken finishes it off with physical moves. Only Typhlosion and Mega Blaziken are properly built, so you can replace the others with better Fire-types, or add any pokemon in free slot (you can even add goldhengo for shiny farm). Just keep Mega Blaziken to handle the buff strategy!
teams.author: sk777
teams.name: Palkia farm for noob

teams.description: Teatime + Payday sur la tasse et une team rapide (Phero peut etre modif)
teams.author: Undi
teams.name: Farm No Goldhingo

teams.description: Team played in reverse, making small division usefull with genetic. Surskit is a must to boost the team, and Breloom is obligatory for his moves (-3 Def.)

teams.description: Team played in reverse, making small division usefull with genetic. Surskit is a must to boost the team, and Breloom is obligatory for his moves (-3 Def.)

Team plus rapide aussi. Switch possible sur le poseur meteo si vous ne lui mettez pas Memento.

teams.name: Gmax Pikachu "Chonkachu" team

teams.name: Secret mon #4 Farm

teams.description: Ceruledge alone does 900k-1m dmg
teams.author: z1
teams.name: M Lucario raid

teams.description: Automatic. A few egg moves.
teams.author: z1
teams.name: Tower Fighting B (Floor 58)

teams.description:
DON'T use Sheer Force on Rampardos; you'll break uTurn.
Works for both rock and ground moves. Ideally everyone will have all 4 of RockTomb/Bulldoze + StoneEdge/Earthquake and swap as needed. 
Team-members chosen for stats and useful signature/egg moves. 
No natures or outside egg moves needed.
Eject button on Stoned Golem allows for an extra full strength attack + pivot.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: A-Tier Sand - Mid-Game

teams.description: For use with overnight/AFK farming, without using tickets.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: AFK Farming

teams.description: Requires white apricots for Costar and Pyrolate, as well as the upgrade to unlock egg moves. ~30% stronger than the mid-game version.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: B-Tier Sun - Late Game

teams.description:
Does not require natures or external signature moves.
Eject Button enables Sheer Force Monferno. 
Feel free to ask questions on Discord @Zenith
_        Future upgrades: 1. Make everyone Modest if possible 2. Replace Quilava with Costar Scovillain [Inferno+Overheat/MysticalFire], and give Flame Orb to Magmar 3. Distribute signature moves, including Flame Burst to Monferno, Weather ball to Magmar, and Inferno to Braixen, among others.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: B-Tier Sun - Mid-Game

teams.description: No natures or external egg moves needed. See late game team for improvements.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: B-Tier Sun - Midgame

teams.description: Heavily reliant on egg moves. Swap Bone Rush on Froakie for Rock Blast/Icicle Spear against flying types.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: C-Tier Trick Room - Late Game

teams.description:
Both v1/v2 shown, with 2.5/5 second kills.
v1 uses only egg moves, useful before getting the upgrade.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: Palkia Farm - Sun Blitz

teams.description: Designed for wild area item/shiny farming, with as much speed and consistency as possible.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: Speed Farming

teams.description: Low optimization sample team for a Grassy Terrain Bug team. No external egg moves or late game abilities required.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: SS-Tier Bugs - Mid-Game

teams.description:
Special attacking baton pass core, with other weathers on Murkrow. 
5 second kill on Gmax Pikachu, with Seismitoad here as backup.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: Trick Room Blitz - G.Pika Farm

teams.description:
Special attacking baton pass core, with other weathers and temp types possible. Sandstorm also works, but is slightly slower.
5 second kill on Gmax Pikachu, with Seismitoad as backup.
teams.author: Zenith
teams.name: Trick Room/Ground Blitz - G.Pika Farm
